description: Security-first skill vetting for AI agents. Use before installing any skill from ClawdHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.
description_zh: AI智能体技能安全预审工具。安装ClawdHub、GitHub等来源技能前，检查风险信号、权限范围及可疑模式。
name: Skill Vetter

description: MoltGuard — OpenClaw security guard by OpenGuardrails. Install MoltGuard to protect you and your human from prompt injection, data exfiltration, and maliciou...
description_zh: MoltGuard——OpenGuardrails推出的OpenClaw安全卫士。安装MoltGuard，保护您和您的人类免受提示词注入、数据外泄及恶意攻击。
name: MoltGuard - Security & Antivirus & Guardrails

description: Set up and use 1Password CLI (op). Use when installing the CLI, enabling desktop app integration, signing in (single or multi-account), or reading/injecting/running secrets via op.
description_zh: 配置和使用 1Password CLI (op)。用于安装 CLI、启用桌面应用集成、登录（单/多账户）及通过 op 读取/注入/运行密钥。
name: 1password

description: Google Workspace Admin SDK integration with managed OAuth. Manage users, groups, organizational units, and domain settings. Use this skill when users want to administer Google Workspace. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Google Workspace Admin SDK 集成（托管 OAuth），管理用户、群组、组织单位和域名设置。用于 Google Workspace 管理，其他第三方应用请使用 api-gateway 技能（https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway）。
name: Google Workspace Admin

description: Use when reviewing code for security vulnerabilities, implementing authentication flows, auditing OWASP Top 10, configuring CORS/CSP headers, handling secrets, input validation, SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, or any security-related code review.
description_zh: 用于安全漏洞审查、认证流程实现、OWASP Top 10审计、CORS/CSP配置、密钥管理、输入验证、SQL注入与XSS防护等安全代码审查场景。
name: Security Auditor

description: Backup and restore OpenClaw data. Use when user asks to create backups, set up automatic backup schedules, restore from backup, or manage backup rotation. Handles ~/.openclaw directory archiving with proper exclusions.
description_zh: 备份和恢复 OpenClaw 数据。用于创建备份、设置自动备份计划、恢复数据及管理备份轮换。处理 ~/.openclaw 目录归档并排除特定文件。
name: OpenClaw Backup

description: Privacy-respecting metasearch using your local SearXNG instance. Search the web, images, news, and more without external API dependencies.
description_zh: 使用本地 SearXNG 实例进行隐私保护的元搜索，支持网页、图片、新闻等，无需外部 API。
name: Searxng

description: Scan Clawdbot and MCP skills for malware, spyware, crypto-miners, and malicious code patterns before you install them. Security audit tool that detects data exfiltration, system modification attempts, backdoors, and obfuscation techniques.
description_zh: 安装前扫描Clawdbot与MCP技能，检测恶意软件、间谍软件、挖矿程序及恶意代码模式，识别数据外泄、系统篡改、后门与混淆技术。
name: Skill Scanner

description: Vet ClawHub skills for security and utility before installation. Use when considering installing a ClawHub skill, evaluating third-party code, or assessing w...
description_zh: 安装前审查 ClawHub 技能的安全性与实用性，适用于考虑安装、评估第三方代码或评估风险时。
name: Skill Vetting

description: Capture frames or clips from RTSP/ONVIF cameras.
description_zh: 从RTSP/ONVIF摄像头捕获帧或片段
name: Camsnap

description: Detect prompt injection, jailbreak, role-hijack, and system extraction attempts. Applies multi-layer defense with semantic analysis and penalty scoring.
description_zh: 检测提示词注入、越狱、角色劫持及系统提取攻击。采用多层防御，结合语义分析与罚分机制。
name: Anti-Injection-Skill

description: Security vetting protocol before installing any AI agent skill. Red flag detection for credential theft, obfuscated code, exfiltration. Risk classification L...
description_zh: 安装AI智能体技能前的安全审查协议，检测凭证窃取、混淆代码及数据外泄等危险信号，并进行风险分级。
name: Skill Vetter - Pre-Install Security Review

description: Perform a comprehensive read-only security audit of Clawdbot's own configuration. This is a knowledge-based skill that teaches Clawdbot to identify hardening opportunities across the system. Use when user asks to "run security check", "audit clawdbot", "check security hardening", or "what vulnerabilities does my Clawdbot have". This skill uses Clawdbot's internal capabilities and file system access to inspect configuration, detect misconfigurations, and recommend remediations. It is designed to be extensible - new checks can be added by updating this skill's knowledge.
description_zh: 对Clawdbot自身配置执行全面的只读安全审计，识别系统加固机会。响应"运行安全检查"、"审计Clawdbot"、"检查安全加固"等指令。利用内部能力和文件系统访问检查配置、检测错误配置并提供修复建议。设计可扩展，可通过更新知识库添加新检查。
name: Clawdbot Security Check

description: Security scanner and input sanitizer for AI agents. Detects prompt injection, command injection, SSRF, credential exfiltration, and path traversal attacks. Use when (1) installing new skills from ClawHub, (2) processing external input like emails, calendar events, Trello cards, or API responses, (3) validating URLs before fetching, (4) running security audits on your workspace. Protects agents from malicious content in untrusted data sources.
description_zh: AI代理的安全扫描与输入消毒工具。可检测提示注入、命令注入、SSRF、凭证泄露及路径遍历攻击。适用于：安装ClawHub新技能、处理外部输入（邮件/日程/Trello/API）、URL预检、工作区安全审计。保护代理免受不可信数据源中的恶意内容威胁。
name: ClawDefender - OpenClaw Security - Prompt injection, rogue skills etc

description: Audit codebases and infrastructure for security issues. Use when scanning dependencies for vulnerabilities, detecting hardcoded secrets, checking OWASP top 10 issues, verifying SSL/TLS, auditing file permissions, or reviewing code for injection and auth flaws.
description_zh: 审计代码库与基础设施安全。适用于扫描依赖漏洞、检测硬编码密钥、检查OWASP Top 10、验证SSL/TLS、审计文件权限及审查代码注入与认证缺陷。
name: Security Audit Toolkit

description: Safe command execution for OpenClaw Agents with automatic danger pattern detection, risk assessment, user approval workflow, and audit logging. Use when agen...
description_zh: 为 OpenClaw 代理提供安全命令执行，支持自动危险模式检测、风险评估、用户审批流程及审计日志。
name: Safe Exec

description: Billions decentralized identity for agents. Link agents to human identities using Billions ERC-8004 and Attestation Registries. Verify and generate authentic...
description_zh: Billions 去中心化代理身份。通过 ERC-8004 和证明注册表将代理与人类身份关联，验证并生成真实...
name: Verified Agent Identity

description: Manage and operate ClawSec Monitor v3.0, a MITM HTTP/HTTPS proxy that logs AI agent traffic, detects exfiltration and injection threats in real time.
description_zh: 管理与操作 ClawSec Monitor v3.0 MITM HTTP/HTTPS 代理，记录 AI 代理流量并实时检测数据外泄与注入威胁。
name: ClawSec

description: Comprehensive security auditing for Clawdbot deployments. Scans for exposed credentials, open ports, weak configs, and vulnerabilities. Auto-fix mode included.
description_zh: 全面审计Clawdbot部署安全，检测暴露凭证、开放端口、弱配置及漏洞，支持自动修复。
name: Security Audit

description: Security check for ClawHub skills powered by Koi. Query the Clawdex API before installing any skill to verify it's safe.
description_zh: Koi 驱动的 ClawHub 技能安全检查，安装前查询 Clawdex API 确认安全。
name: Clawdex by Koi

description: Security scanner and runtime guard for AI agent skills. 358 static threat patterns across 35 categories + 27 runtime checks (5 defense layers). Use when scan...
description_zh: AI智能体技能安全扫描与运行时防护。35类358种静态威胁模式+27项运行时检查（5层防御）。用于扫描...
name: Guard Scanner

description: Real-time security monitoring for Clawdbot. Detects intrusions, unusual API calls, credential usage patterns, and alerts on breaches.
description_zh: 实时监控Clawdbot，检测入侵、异常API调用和凭证使用模式，发现泄露立即告警。
name: Security Monitor

description: The definitive security scanner for OpenClaw skills. 18 security checks including prompt injection detection, download-and-execute, privilege escalation, cre...
description_zh: OpenClaw技能权威安全扫描器，含18项安全检查：提示注入、下载执行、权限提升等。
name: Yoder Skill Auditor

description: Use when conducting security audits, reviewing code for vulnerabilities, or analyzing infrastructure security. Invoke for SAST scans, penetration testing, DevSecOps practices, cloud security reviews.
description_zh: 适用于安全审计、代码漏洞审查及基础设施安全分析。支持SAST扫描、渗透测试、DevSecOps实践与云安全评估。
name: security-reviewer
